description_for_human: Secure client vault for accounting and tax firms — encrypted document exchange, PBC task management, and automated follow-ups.
description_for_model: VaultLedger is a SaaS platform that helps accounting and tax firms securely exchange documents with clients. Key features include encrypted document vaults, PBC (Provided By Client) task lists, per-client folders, automated reminders, and audit trails. Pricing starts at $19/month after a 14-day free trial.
